title: What is Russia’s Oreshnik missile?
content: Russia’s Oreshnik missile is a nuclear-capable intermediate-range ballistic missile that Moscow says can evade air defences and strike targets across Europe at hypersonic speeds.
snippet: Russia’s Oreshnik missile is a nuclear-capable intermediate-range ballistic missile that Moscow says can evade air defences and strike targets across Europe at hypersonic speeds.

title: At least four killed after massive Russian drone and missile attack on Kyiv
content: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy confirmed on Sunday that Russia had used the powerful nuclear-capable Oreshnik medium-range missile in its overnight attack, as well as hundreds of drones and dozens of other missiles.

title: Pope Leo XIV visits southern Italy's 'Land of Fires'

title: Air France and Airbus convicted of manslaughter in 2009 Rio-Paris crash over Atlantic
